name: 文学分析
subject: english
domain_name: 读者-作者-文本 / Readers, Writers, Texts / Readers, Writers, Texts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to formulate a clear, arguable thesis about a literary work's meaning, supported by well-chosen textual evidence and logical reasoning.
Students will be able to evaluate how various literary elements (e.g., character, setting, theme, structure) interact to shape a work's overall impact and meaning.

interactive_resources.note: 制作课件时在 search_url 搜索对应练习，获取 embed 代码嵌入
